content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09B","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09B named J09B_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. Set all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. Join this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION
5. Join this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   - If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data
   - Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING" for every EQUNR in EABL where both conditions hold:
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and record created in 2024
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and record created in 2023
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09B_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL" for every EQUNR in EABL where both conditions hold:
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023
11. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09B_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
12. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all customers
13. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries as CSV file named J09B including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
14. Send them to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com
15. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data"}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09B named J09B_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. Set all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. Set all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. Join this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION
5. Join this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   - If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data
   - Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING" for every EQUNR in EABL where both conditions hold:
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and record created in 2024
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and record created in 2023
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09B_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL" for every EQUNR in EABL where both conditions hold:
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023
11. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09B_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
12. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all customers
13. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries as CSV file named J09B including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
14. Send them to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com
15. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data

args.sqlite_command:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_temp; CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS WITH house_counts AS (SELECT HAUS, COUNT(EQUNR) AS eq_count FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%' GROUP BY HAUS) SELECT d.*, CASE WHEN hc.eq_count < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END AS ENTSCHEIDUNG FROM decision_table d LEFT JOIN house_counts hc ON d.HAUS = hc.HAUS WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09B%';
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG='EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld');
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_final;
CREATE TABLE J09B_final AS WITH eabl_flags AS (
  SELECT EQUNR,
         MAX(CASE WHEN ISTABLART_TXT='Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4)='2024' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_mand_2024,
         MAX(CASE WHEN ISTABLART_TXT='Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4)='2023' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_mand_2023,
         MAX(CASE WHEN ISTABLART_TXT='Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4)='2024' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_direct_2024,
         MAX(CASE WHEN ISTABLART_TXT='Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4)='2023' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_direct_2023
  FROM eabl
  GROUP BY EQUNR
)
SELECT jt.HAUS,
       jt.ANLAGE,
       jt.ME_MA_ID,
       jt.EQUNR,
       jt.HOUSE_NUM1,
       CASE
         WHEN ef.has_mand_2024 = 1 AND ef.has_mand_2023 = 1 THEN 'MANDATORY_READING'
         WHEN ef.has_direct_2024 = 1 AND ef.has_direct_2023 = 1 THEN 'DIRECT_MAIL'
         ELSE jt.ENTSCHEIDUNG
       END AS ENTSCHEIDUNG,
       COALESCE(sm.TITLE, nm.TITLE) AS TITLE,
       COALESCE(sm.FORENAME, nm.FORENAME) AS FORENAME,
       COALESCE(sm.SURNAME, nm.SURNAME) AS SURNAME,
       CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.STREET ELSE nm.STREET END AS STREET,
       CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.STREETNO ELSE nm.STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
       CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.POST_CODE1 ELSE nm.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1,
       CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.CITY1 ELSE nm.CITY1 END AS CITY1,
       CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.CITY2 ELSE nm.CITY2 END AS CITY2,
       CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.EMAIL ELSE nm.EMAIL END AS EMAIL,
       eb."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No."
FROM J09B_temp jt
LEFT JOIN eablg eg ON jt.ANLAGE = eg.Installation
LEFT JOIN eabl eb ON eg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." = eb."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No."
LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON jt.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON jt.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN eabl_flags ef ON jt.EQUNR = ef.EQUNR;

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS WITH house_counts AS (SELECT HAUS, COUNT(EQUNR) AS eq_count FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%' GROUP BY HAUS) SELECT d.*, CASE WHEN hc.eq_count < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END AS ENTSCHEIDUNG FROM decision_table d LEFT JOIN house_counts hc ON d.HAUS = hc.HAUS WHERE d.TOUR LIKE 'J09B%'
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG='EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld')

CREATE TABLE J09B_final AS WITH eabl_flags AS ( SELECT EQUNR, MAX(CASE WHEN ISTABLART_TXT='Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4)='2024' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_mand_2024, MAX(CASE WHEN ISTABLART_TXT='Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4)='2023' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_mand_2023, MAX(CASE WHEN ISTABLART_TXT='Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4)='2024' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_direct_2024, MAX(CASE WHEN ISTABLART_TXT='Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4)='2023' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_direct_2023 FROM eabl GROUP BY EQUNR ) SELECT jt.HAUS, jt.ANLAGE, jt.ME_MA_ID, jt.EQUNR, jt.HOUSE_NUM1, CASE WHEN ef.has_mand_2024 = 1 AND ef.has_mand_2023 = 1 THEN 'MANDATORY_READING' WHEN ef.has_direct_2024 = 1 AND ef.has_direct_2023 = 1 THEN 'DIRECT_MAIL' ELSE jt.ENTSCHEIDUNG END AS ENTSCHEIDUNG, COALESCE(sm.TITLE, nm.TITLE) AS TITLE, COALESCE(sm.FORENAME, nm.FORENAME) AS FORENAME, COALESCE(sm.SURNAME, nm.SURNAME) AS SURNAME, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.STREET ELSE nm.STREET END AS STREET, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.STREETNO ELSE nm.STREETNO END AS STREETNO, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.POST_CODE1 ELSE nm.POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.CITY1 ELSE nm.CITY1 END AS CITY1, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.CITY2 ELSE nm.CITY2 END AS CITY2, CASE WHEN sm.EQUNR IS NOT NULL THEN sm.EMAIL ELSE nm.EMAIL END AS EMAIL, eb."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." FROM J09B_temp jt LEFT JOIN eablg eg ON jt.ANLAGE = eg.Installation LEFT JOIN eabl eb ON eg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." = eb."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON jt.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON jt.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR LEFT JOIN eabl_flags ef ON jt.EQUNR = ef.EQUNR

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09B_final WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG='MANDATORY_READING'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09B_final WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG='DIRECT_MAIL'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09B_final WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG NOT IN ('MANDATORY_READING','DIRECT_MAIL')

Process J09B completed.

Results:
- Exported `J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv` with 792 rows
- Exported `J09B_DIRECT_MAIL.csv` with 4068 rows
- Exported `J09B.csv` with 15320 rows

Actions completed:
- Sent mandatory reading file to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`
- Sent 4068 direct emails via bulk mail service
- Sent remaining export to `meter.readings@evu.com`
- Deleted temporary table `J09B_temp`

Files created in session folder:
- `sessions/gpt-5.4/processadaptation_extension_mail_processadaptationmethod_add_tour_J09B_seed_1824/J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv`
- `sessions/gpt-5.4/processadaptation_extension_mail_processadaptationmethod_add_tour_J09B_seed_1824/J09B_DIRECT_MAIL.csv`
